sizing_rule.note: Anti-martingale sizing: increase position as equity grows (1.0 * current_equity/initial_equity multiplier), reduce by 25% when drawdown exceeds 10%. Never increase risk during losing streaks.

source_rule_text: Position size should increase as account equity grows, never decrease during losing streaks; use anti-martingale position sizing scaled to account size rather than martingale strategies that increase risk during drawdowns.
